expected_output: Ethereum addresses should start with 0x and use 40 hexadecimal characters after the prefix.
Solana addresses are Base58-encoded Ed25519 public keys and are usually 32 to 44 characters long.

input: cross-chain transfer USDC permanent loss funds
expected_output: Sending assets across incompatible chains without a supported bridge can cause permanent loss of funds.

input: clipboard hijacking address verification copy paste
expected_output: Clipboard hijacking can replace a copied address, so users should verify pasted addresses before sending funds.
